## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Understory and GrowthX to discuss website updates, content strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New website prototype loads \~10x faster than previous site; CMS access via Sanity provided](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [5 new articles in progress, 3 ready for review; focus on cold calling + SaaS-relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Plan to create podcast summaries as blog posts; separate case studies section under 'Resources'](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Understory to provide podcast MP3s/transcripts for content creation; website handover in progress](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

## Topics

### Website Updates and Handover

  - [New site loads significantly faster, improving SEO potential](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Sanity CMS access provided to Understory team (Ali, Alex, Chris)](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [GitHub repository to be transferred to Understory's ownership](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

  - [Minor typo fixed in testimonial section (QClay → Clay)](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [GrowthX team available for Sanity CMS walkthrough if needed](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation

      - [Case studies](https://fathom.video/share/exDa7dmgc49bdPiwWeCHQ-FfXx4xJEsB?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

### Website Structure and Navigation
